content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -1.0%, Nifty IT -4.3% leading the selloff, VIX +3.4% to 19.23 signaling rising fear. Book is 67% deployed with net unrealized loss on the session — priority is position management, not new adds. Several holdings are near SL or near highs warranting active SL management.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 76.24 vs SL 75.00 — stress near SL but not breached. Fundamentals strong (Q4 PAT +34.9%, GNPA 1.45%). Capital raise overhang + profit-booking after 52w high is dragging. Hold SL at 75 (structural support at S2 76.95 already broken intraday, 75 is below prior consolidation). If 75 breaks, exit via SL — no need to MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1004.50,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best performer +4% but current SL 1004.50 is already above entry 984 (breakeven+) — no no-op MODIFY needed. Actually SL already locked above entry, so HOLD is appropriate. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -1% drawdown is normal noise. SL 119 is 3.9% below CMP 123.89, reasonable given ATR. Geopolitical risk + VIX up supports holding. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Near entry, SL 1405 tight (0.6% below CMP) near VWAP 1420. FMCG defensive amid selloff, blockbuster Q4 results supportive. SL already tight — leave it. P&L only +0.1% so trailing further not warranted yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL 1049 already at breakeven — max risk protected. P&L +0.3% barely positive, not enough to trail higher given ATR / intraday range (1047-1079). Apr 27 board meeting is a binary event — SL at entry handles downside, upside open. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, +0.6% gain. SL 675 is 1.7% below CMP 686.75 — tight. Apr 29 earnings is binary; current SL handles downside. Shooting star on Apr 22 is a caution flag but not broken. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "-2.6% drawdown today after giving back intraday gains. SL 2260 is 2.2% below CMP, still intact. Q4 results Apr 30 is catalyst. Thesis (FMCG defensive + Nestle read-through) not yet broken. Allow SL to work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1%, SL 393 is 1.8% below CMP 400. Q4 results May 15 too far out — this is a momentum/theme trade. Near consensus target upper end (400-440), limited upside. Hold with existing SL; no trailing warranted at small loss."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 75 is just below CMP 76.24 at structural support; let the stop work. Do not widen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1004.50 already locked above entry 984 — gain protected. No further trail needed until price pushes toward 1050+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, normal noise, SL far enough to allow thesis to play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight near entry, P&L minimal. No trail."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven. Pre-earnings binary risk contained."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL tight at 675. Shooting star + 52w high extended — let price define next move ahead of Apr 29 earnings."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Sold off today but SL 2260 still intact; Q4 catalyst Apr 30."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small loss, SL at 393 handles downside; no trailing with negative P&L."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS, HUDCO, PNBHOUSING-style strength worth tracking. OFSS showed huge volume absorption at support post results — interesting but at 52w range upper half. HUDCO +3.76% strong relative strength with AAA rating — watch for pullback to 200-205 as entry zone. CLEAN volume surge is bearish (downtrend + new MD + weak Q3) — AVOID. DIVISLAB worth re-examining post Apr earnings. NAVINFLUOR Apr 29 earnings binary event.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed on Day 5, sitting at small net unrealized loss with VIX rising. This is not an accumulation day — explicit deployment hysteresis applies. Focus is existing book management only. Multiple holdings have earnings catalysts in next 1-2 weeks (AUBANK Apr 27, NAVINFLUOR/GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30, NTPC May 15) creating concentrated event risk — the intraday SLs handle downside. Holdings span sectors well (PSU bank, HFC, gold, FMCG x2, private bank, pharma, energy) so sector concentration not an issue. No new entries today; conservation mode."
}
